Sound of Freedom (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $184,178,046Details
International Box Office $66,559,756
Worldwide Box Office $250,737,802
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,784,822
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,223,996
Total $5,008,818
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After rescuing a boy from ruthless child traffickers, a federal agent learns the boy's sister is still captive and decides to embark on a dangerous mission to save her. With time running out, he quits his job and journeys deep into the Colombian jungle, putting his life on the line to free her from a fate worse than death.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$19,680,879 (10.7% of total gross)
Legs:6.75 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:73.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$14,500,000 (worldwide box office is 17.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,952 opening theaters/3,411 max. theaters, 7.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $201,350,044

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 4th, 2023 (Wide) by Angel Studios
International Releases: August 17th, 2023 (Wide) (Kuwait)
August 18th, 2023 (Wide) (Nigeria)
August 18th, 2023 (Wide) (Iceland)
August 18th, 2023 (Wide), released as Laisvės garsas (Lithuania)
August 18th, 2023 (Wide) (Oman)
Video Release: November 2023 by VidAngel
MPA Rating: PG-13 for thematic content involving sex trafficking, violence, language, sexual references, some drug references and smoking throughout.
(Rating bulletin 2784 (cert #54464), 5/24/2023)
Running Time: 135 minutes
Geographical setting: California, Colombia, Honduras, United States
Plot point: Missing Child, Returning Soldiers, Sex Crimes
Social setting: Human-Trafficking
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Time period setting: 2010s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Santa Fe Films, Ambi Media Group
Production Countries: United States, Colombia, Mexico
Languages: English, Spanish

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.


  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

After rescuing a boy from ruthless child traffickers, a federal agent learns the boy's sister is still captive and decides to embark on a dangerous mission to save her. With time running out, he quits his job and journeys deep into the Colombian jungle, putting his life on the line to free her from a fate worse than death.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$19,680,879 (10.7% of total gross)
Legs:6.75 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:73.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$14,500,000 (worldwide box office is 17.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,952 opening theaters/3,411 max. theaters, 7.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $201,350,044

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 4th, 2023 (Wide) by Angel Studios
International Releases: August 17th, 2023 (Wide) (Kuwait)
August 18th, 2023 (Wide) (Nigeria)
August 18th, 2023 (Wide) (Iceland)
August 18th, 2023 (Wide), released as Laisvės garsas (Lithuania)
August 18th, 2023 (Wide) (Oman)
Video Release: November 2023 by VidAngel
MPA Rating: PG-13 for thematic content involving sex trafficking, violence, language, sexual references, some drug references and smoking throughout.
(Rating bulletin 2784 (cert #54464), 5/24/2023)
Running Time: 135 minutes
Geographical setting: California, Colombia, Honduras, United States
Plot point: Missing Child, Returning Soldiers, Sex Crimes

Subgenre: Action Thriller

Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization

Languages: English, Spanish
